requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Sweden should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, fleet operator, public-sector project, or DSO-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with SS-EN 61000 EMC and power-quality standards under the EMC Directive. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional communications, spectrum, cybersecurity, and data-interface checks under RED, Swedish national requirements, or PTS (the Swedish Post and Telecom Authority) spectrum rules.
summary.zh: 在瑞典，若充电点运营商、车队运营方、公共部门项目或DSO相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应依据EMC指令与SS-EN 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据RED、瑞典国家要求或PTS（瑞典邮政与电信管理局）频谱规则触发额外通信、频谱、网络安全和数据接口检查。
summary.zht: 在瑞典，若充電點運營商、車隊運營方、公共部門項目或DSO相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應依據EMC指令與SS-EN 61000 EMC和電能質量標準一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據RED、瑞典國家要求或PTS（瑞典郵政與電信管理局）頻譜規則觸發額外通訊、頻譜、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
SS-EN 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality (SIS adoption)
SS-EN IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
Swedish Post and Telecom Authority (PTS) or applicable spectrum authority requirements for radio modules where in scope, under RED 2014/53/EU

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Swedish operators, roaming, language, currency, and data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为瑞典运营商、漫游、语言、货币和数据接口重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為瑞典運營商、漫遊、語言、貨幣和數據接口重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module approval path (PTS / RED), and SS-EN 61000 EMC reports for the final Swedish configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the specific DSO supply point and Swedish grid constraints, with cold-climate operation considered.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终瑞典配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块审批路径（PTS / RED），以及SS-EN 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合具体DSO供电点及瑞典电网约束进行审查，并考虑寒冷气候运行。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終瑞典配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組審批路徑（PTS / RED），以及SS-EN 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合具體DSO供電點及瑞典電網約束進行審查，並考慮寒冷氣候運行。

mandatory_status.target: EMC compliance under the EMC Directive (SS-EN 61000) is mandatory for CE marking; OCPP integration is project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, fleet, or utility-linked chargers where required by the CPO, DSO, tender, or site-owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sweden networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, SS-EN 61000 EMC and power quality, and Swedish communications-module requirements (PTS / RED). GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 瑞典联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、SS-EN 61000 EMC和电能质量，以及瑞典通信模块要求（PTS / RED）。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 瑞典聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、SS-EN 61000 EMC和電能質量，以及瑞典通訊模組要求（PTS / RED）。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。
